case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. CARLOS ROBERTO VASQUEZ ORDONEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-12-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IN IS PRESENT.
